form.layout: =========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== lineNo[行号] billingDate[账单日期] billingMilestone[账单里程碑] paymentVoucherCode[付款凭证号] paidFlag[已付款] =========>amount[金额信息]====== amountSource[源币种金额] amountFunctional[本位币金额] exchangeRate[汇率] currencyId[币种] =========>reference[业务关联]====== cipId[在建工程] ========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注] createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

form.title: 查询条件
